pages.title: Emotion-Aware ASR
pages.kicker: Do not turn affect into a single transcript label

cards.title: Define the construct
cards.body: Choose arousal, valence, frustration, laughter, sentiment, or risk before choosing a model.

cards.title: Pick the time scale
cards.body: Frame, utterance, speaker turn, and conversation labels answer different research questions.

cards.title: Constrain the action
cards.body: Use calibrated affect as evidence for safe behavior, not as a claim about a person.
